meta.title: Why Betting Against Open Source is a "Bad Bet"
meta.description:
A moment of candor from an Amazon (AWS) executive: proprietary attempts to kill open source historically fail. Why betting against open collaboration is almost always a "bad bet" in the long run.

At AI Dev, we bring together builders from open source and enterprise to shape the future of software.

We’ll continue these conversations at AI Dev 26 × San Francisco, April 28–29.

Tickets available: https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
